tasks.title: Confirm the build approach
tasks.expectedOutput: Implementation plan with boundaries, risks, tests, and handoff notes
tasks.resultSummary: Architecture response recorded. Canonical package and approved Blueprint control implementation scope.

tasks.title: Implement the approved package
tasks.requiredInput: Founder-approved Natural Nation Day 1 member-facing foundation under app/frontend.
tasks.expectedOutput: A real GitHub pull request with implementation and validation evidence.
tasks.resultSummary: Implementation created through the protected repository adapter. GitHub pull request: https://github.com/Natural-Nation-MVP/natural-nation-mvp/pull/30. Changed files: app/frontend/README.md, app/frontend/app.js, app/frontend/index.html, app/frontend/styles.css, app/frontend/tests/validate-foundation.mjs. Validation evidence is included in app/frontend/tests/validate-foundation.mjs.

tasks.title: Review the experience
tasks.requiredInput: Review only PR #30 and these exact files: app/frontend/index.html, app/frontend/styles.css, app/frontend/app.js, app/frontend/README.md, app/frontend/tests/validate-foundation.mjs.
tasks.expectedOutput: A schema-valid experience_review JSON object containing passes, issues, merge blockers, recommendation, and file-based evidence
tasks.resultSummary: Gemini completed a file-based experience review of PR #30. The review passed the deterministic contract and recommended changes before merge due to persistence, user feedback, keyboard-focus, duplicate-listener, and placeholder-image concerns.

retryContext.reason: The verifier incorrectly treated legitimate review findings containing words such as placeholder and incomplete as provider execution failure.
retryContext.requiredCorrection: Structured contracts are now validated before generic narrative heuristics.

tasks.title: Prepare the Founder review
tasks.requiredInput: VERIFIED IMPLEMENTATION: PR #30 created five files under app/frontend: index.html, styles.css, app.js, README.md, and tests/validate-foundation.mjs. GEMINI VERIFIED REVIEW: passes include semantic dashboard structure and responsive breakpoints. Required changes before merge: add persistent state, replace browser alerts with in-UI feedback, add keyboard focus-visible styling, remove possible duplicate click listeners, and replace the external placeholder Duey image. Recommendation: changes_required. Prepare the Founder decision package from this evidence. Return ONLY one valid JSON object with no introduction and no markdown fence: {"type":"founder_review","decision":"request_changes","comments":["what was built and what passed"],"risks":["remaining merge blockers"],"nextAction":"Send the five verified corrections back to Codex before Founder approval."}
tasks.expectedOutput: A schema-valid founder_review JSON object with decision, comments, risks, and nextAction

retryContext.reason: GPose fallback wrapped valid JSON in narrative and incorrectly claimed verified upstream evidence was missing.
retryContext.requiredCorrection: Embed the verified implementation and Gemini findings directly in the task, require one JSON object, and accept recoverable provider wrappers around that object.

tasks.resultSummary: {"type":"founder_review","decision":"request_changes","comments":["PR #30 created five foundational frontend files (index.html, styles.css, app.js, README.md, and tests/validate-foundation.mjs) under app/frontend. The Gemini review confirms a semantic dashboard structure and responsive breakpoints have been successfully implemented."],"risks":["Persistent state needs to be added, browser alerts must be replaced with in-UI feedback, keyboard focus-visible styling is required, possible duplicate click listeners should be removed, and the external placeholder Duey image must be replaced."],"nextAction":"Send the five verified corrections back to Codex before Founder approval."}

tasks.title: Approve or request changes
tasks.requiredInput: Verified build pull request, validation evidence, deterministic experience review, and deterministic Founder summary
